title: MCLN EX45-Receiving Date Enhancements Configuration Guide
fullText: Configuration Document   EX45 – R eceiving Date Enhancements           Contents    TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1. Configuration Explanation PAGEREF _Toc182570473 \h 3 2. Configuration Prerequisites PAGEREF _Toc182570474 \h 3 3. Configuration Steps PAGEREF _Toc182570475 \h 3 3.1 System Codes PAGEREF _Toc182570476 \h 3 3.2 Transaction Parameters PAGEREF _Toc182570477 \h 5 4. Message Master PAGEREF _Toc182570478 \h 10 5. Post Configuration Instructions PAGEREF _Toc182570479 \h 11 6. Questions and Answers PAGEREF _Toc182570480 \h 11           Configuration Explanation     This document details the configuration steps for the EX45 – R eceiving Date Enhancements .    Configuration Prerequisites       Configuration Steps     Steps for all necessary  configuration  can be found below.    3.1 System Codes     Global Extension    Navigate to the  System Codes  UI.       Search by Code Type 000 and select the Apply button.       C lick the selected Custom Codes and select Code IDs    4. Select the Add button, populate as below, and select save    Enable the EX45 extension and save.        3.2 Transaction Parameters     EX45 Receiving Date Enhancements   1. Navigate to the  Transaction Parameters (Configuration)  UI and filter for Receiving transactions * Recv * .      2. Select NEW Recv -Mixed Item and click Program Template to add a parameter.          3. Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter      [Text Wrapping Break]   4. Add a new transaction parameter as below, hit the Save button          Select the NEW Recv -Mixed Item transaction, and hit the Edit button          Enable the parameter as below, select the Save button  Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter Add a new transaction parameter as below, hit the Save button Description- EX45 Expiration Date Validation Select the NEW Recv -Mixed Item transaction, and hit the Edit button Enable the parameter as below, select the Save button Note: Please repeat enablement steps for NEW Recv - Single Item transaction Message Master     Go the messages UI and select message master Click the Plus button near the top right to add a new message Add the message below Go back to the message screen and ensure the message is configured Click the Plus button near the top right to add a new message Add the message below Go back to the message screen and ensure the message is configured   Post Configuration Instructions      Once the configuration has been entered, the following actions need to be taken before the configuration is active:    System Action   Required?   No Action Needed  No  Environment Cache Clear  Yes  Environment Restart  No  App Server Restart  No    To clear the cache – go to the Cache Administration UI, select all applications , then clear. Questions and Answers     This below table is used to track questions that were asked and answered regarding this enhancement. If the question resulted in any action it is listed against the question.    #   Asked By   Question   Answered By   Answer   Date Added   Action Taken

Questions and Answers            Configuration Explanation     This document details the configuration steps for the EX45 – R eceiving Date Enhancements .    Configuration Prerequisites       Configuration Steps     Steps for all necessary  configuration  can be found below.    3.1 System Codes     Global Extension    Navigate to the  System Codes  UI.       Search by Code Type 000 and select the Apply button.       C lick the selected Custom Codes and select Code IDs    4. Select the Add button, populate as below, and select save    Enable the EX45 extension and save.        3.2 Transaction Parameters     EX45 Receiving Date Enhancements   1. Navigate to the  Transaction Parameters (Configuration)  UI and filter for Receiving transactions * Recv * .      2. Select NEW Recv -Mixed Item and click Program Template to add a parameter.          3. Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter      [Text Wrapping Break]   4. Add a new transaction parameter as below, hit the Save button          Select the NEW Recv -Mixed Item transaction, and hit the Edit button          Enable the parameter as below, select the Save button  Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter Add a new transaction parameter as below, hit the Save button Description- EX45 Expiration Date Validation Select the NEW Recv -Mixed Item transaction, and hit the Edit button Enable the parameter as below, select the Save button Note: Please repeat enablement steps for NEW Recv - Single Item transaction Message Master     Go the messages UI and select message master Click the Plus button near the top right to add a new message Add the message below Go back to the message screen and ensure the message is configured Click the Plus button near the top right to add a new message Add the message below Go back to the message screen and ensure the message is configured   Post Configuration Instructions      Once the configuration has been entered, the following actions need to be taken before the configuration is active:    System Action   Required?
